model: Think MCP tools/list + Grove notify: this registry is the hot path; each power file is a cold pull — load at most one per turn unless user asks for more.

powers.description: New feature or behavior change — KB/atoms first, three approaches, Sean ratifies before code.
Multi-step work — write ordered checklist; stop at scope boundaries; no architect sprawl.
Run an approved plan — next incomplete step only; valid stops: blocker, permission, ambiguity that changes design.
Failure or wrong behavior — evidence before fix; smallest repro; surgical diff.
New logic — red test, minimal green, refactor only inside scope.
Before done/merged — run the commands you would use to prove it; capture output.
Non-trivial repo work — isolated branch in a worktree; no drive-by master edits.
Someone reviewed your code — verify claims, push back on wrong feedback, then implement.
Shippable chunk — request review with risks, test commands, and intent.
